item.title: Golden State Medical Supply Inc.: GSMS Incorporated, NIACIN EXTENDED-RELEASE TABLETS, USP, 1,000 MG, 90 tablets, Rx only, Recall
item.product: GSMS Incorporated, NIACIN EXTENDED-RELEASE TABLETS, USP, 1,000 MG, 90 tablets, Rx only,
item.summary: Failed Dissolution Specifications: During 12-month long-term stability testing, subject lot was out of specification (low) for stage 3 dissolution at the 24-hour timepoint. Product details: GSMS Incorporated, NIACIN EXTENDED-RELEASE TABLETS, USP, 1,000 MG, 90 tablets, Rx only, Manufactured by Kremers Urban Pharmaceuticals Inc., a subsidiary of Lannett, Inc., Seymour, IN 47274, Packaged by GSMS Incorporated, Camarillo, CA 93012. NDC 51407-268-90.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
